name: Wireless Noise-Cancelling Headphones
description: Premium over-ear headphones with active noise cancellation, 30-hour battery life, and ultra-comfortable memory foam ear cushions.

name: Minimalist Leather Watch
description: Elegant analog watch with genuine Italian leather strap, sapphire crystal glass, and Japanese quartz movement.

name: Organic Cotton T-Shirt
description: Sustainably sourced 100% organic cotton tee. Pre-shrunk, tagless, and available in multiple earth-toned colors.

name: Smart Fitness Tracker
description: Track your health 24/7 with heart rate monitoring, sleep analysis, GPS, and 14-day battery life. Water resistant to 50m.

name: Handcrafted Ceramic Mug Set
description: Set of 4 artisanal stoneware mugs, each hand-thrown and glazed by skilled craftspeople. Microwave and dishwasher safe.

name: Premium Backpack
description: Water-resistant nylon backpack with padded laptop compartment, USB charging port, and ergonomic shoulder straps.

name: Stainless Steel Water Bottle
description: Double-wall vacuum insulated bottle. Keeps drinks cold 24h or hot 12h. BPA-free, 750ml capacity.

name: Slim Fit Chino Pants
description: Stretch cotton chinos with a modern slim fit. Wrinkle-resistant fabric perfect for office or weekend wear.

name: Bluetooth Portable Speaker
description: Waterproof portable speaker with 360-degree sound, 20-hour battery, and built-in microphone. Perfect for outdoor adventures.

name: Cashmere Blend Sweater
description: Luxuriously soft cashmere-blend crew neck sweater. Ribbed cuffs and hem, available in classic neutral tones.

name: Scented Soy Candle Set
description: Hand-poured soy wax candles in artisan glass jars. Set of 3: vanilla, lavender, and eucalyptus. 40+ hour burn time each.

name: Aviator Sunglasses
description: Classic gold-frame aviator sunglasses with polarized UV400 lenses. Lightweight titanium construction with adjustable nose pads.

name: 4K Action Camera
description: Ultra HD action camera with image stabilization, waterproof to 30m, and wide-angle lens. Includes mounts and carrying case.

name: Linen Blazer
description: Lightweight unlined linen blazer with notched lapels and patch pockets. Breathable fabric ideal for smart-casual occasions.

name: Marble Serving Board
description: Premium natural marble serving board with brass handles. Perfect for charcuterie, cheese, or appetizer presentation.

name: Leather Card Holder
description: Slim RFID-blocking card holder crafted from full-grain leather. Holds up to 8 cards with a center pull-tab for quick access.

name: Noise-Cancelling Earbuds
description: True wireless earbuds with adaptive ANC, transparency mode, and 8-hour battery life. IPX5 water resistant for workouts.

name: Bamboo Kitchen Utensil Set
description: Eco-friendly bamboo kitchen tool set including spatula, spoon, tongs, and turner. Naturally antimicrobial and heat resistant.

name: Wool Beanie Hat
description: Premium merino wool beanie with fleece lining. Ribbed knit design keeps you warm without sacrificing style.

name: Smart LED Desk Lamp
description: Touch-controlled LED desk lamp with 5 color modes, 7 brightness levels, wireless charging base, and USB charging port.
